name: auto-continue-plus-plus
description: Advanced Auto-Accept Agent with Multi-Tab and Recovery features.

commands.title: Auto-Continue Swarm: Spawn Delegates via Megaprompt

autoContinue.pollingSpeed.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for the Auto-Accept loop.

autoContinue.watchdogTimeoutSeconds.description: Seconds of inactivity before the Watchdog checks for a stuck Agent. Set to 0 to disable this feature safely.

autoContinue.maxTokenLimit.description: The exact maximum token size of your LLM Context Window (e.g. 120000 for Claude 3 Sonnet).

autoContinue.apiCostPerMillionTokens.description: Estimated cost in USD per 1 Million input tokens for the LLM you are using (e.g., 3.0 for Claude 3.5 Sonnet).

autoContinue.billingMode.description: Select how you are billed for AI usage. This changes the Dashboard's budget projection logic.

autoContinue.subscriptionRefreshHours.description: For subscriptions like Google One AI Ultra, how many hours until your quota resets.

autoContinue.subscriptionTokenLimit.description: Estimated maximum total tokens you can consume within the refresh window before being rate-limited.

autoContinue.apiDailyBudget.description: For Pay-As-You-Go, the maximum amount of USD you want to spend in a 24-hour period.

autoContinue.bannedCommands.description: List of string keywords or Regex patterns that, if matched in a terminal command, will prevent auto-execution.

scripts.deploy: npm run package && git add . && node -e "require('child_process').execSync('git commit -m \"Automated deployment build v' + require('./package.json').version + ' - See CHANGELOG.md\"', {stdio:'inherit'})" && git push && npm run publish:vsce && npm run publish:ovsx
